entity.summary: Kaia DeFi trading platform combining DEX aggregation with its own concentrated-liquidity DEX and related trading, staking, and portfolio features.
entity.notes: The candidate row Consensus Liquidity DEX is represented under the Swapscanner parent entity because the first-party site exposes CL DEX as a product surface alongside aggregation and other Kaia DeFi services. Current protocol data reports substantial TVL, fees, revenue, and recent DEX volume.

evidence.title: Swapscanner official platform
evidence.notes: First-party platform identifies Swapscanner as a Kaia DEX aggregator and one-stop DeFi platform and exposes CL DEX as a product surface.

evidence.title: Consensus Liquidity DEX protocol profile and metrics
evidence.notes: Protocol profile reports current Kaia TVL, fees, revenue, and recent 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day DEX volume for the CL DEX surface.
